headline: A Google employee allegedly used inside information to win $1.2 million on Polymarket
summary: Google employee charged with fraud. Allegedly won $1.2 million on Polymarket bets. Used confidential company information related to Search trends.

headline: Apple’s newest iPad Air is up to $100 off for the first time
summary: Apple's latest iPad Air is now discounted. Save up to $100 on the new model. It's the best price yet for the 11-inch 128GB Wi-Fi version.

headline: All the news about Ferrari’s polarizing Luce EV
summary: Ferrari's new Luce EV faces backlash for its design. Fans criticize the electric sedan for not looking like a traditional Ferrari. Designed with Jony Ive's LoveFrom, its launch preceded a stock drop.

headline: The new Halide camera app launches with film looks and an upgraded photo editor
summary: Lux Optics released the Halide Mark III camera app for iPhone and iPad. It features a new film simulation engine. Includes five new 'Looks' for in-app photo styling.

headline: Opinion: With A $949 Steam Deck, The Steam Machine Will Probably Be Very Expensive
summary: Steam Deck's price increase suggests an expensive Steam Machine. PC gaming hardware costs continue to rise. Expect Steam Machine to likely cost over $1,000.

headline: Ditch the Bubble Level, The Fanttik D2 Pocket 2-Axis Osram Green Laser Level Is Priced Under $30
summary: Fanttik D2 Pocket Laser Level now under $30. Offers 2-axis Osram Green Laser technology. A modern alternative to traditional bubble levels.

headline: Get a 5-Pack of 60W USB Type-C Cables for $7.50 (Averages Out to a Mere $1.50 Per Cable)
summary: Score a 5-pack of 60W USB-C cables for $7.50. Each cable averages just $1.50. Compatible with Nintendo Switch 2, Steam Deck, and iPhones.

headline: The Baseus 20,000mAh 45W Power Bank With Dual USB-C Cables Drops to $21 After Coupon
summary: Baseus 20,000mAh power bank on sale for $21. Features 45W output and dual USB-C cables. Perfect for charging and gaming on devices like Steam Deck.

headline: 'We are at risk of a lost generation': One in six young people will not be in work or training in five years without action, report warns
summary: Report warns of a 'lost generation' of young people. One in six risks being out of work or training in five years. Urgent action needed to address rising youth unemployment.

headline: I just want freedom from fear, says girl raped by teenage boys as sentences to be reviewed
summary: Teenage girl speaks out after being raped by boys. Describes suffering flashbacks and living in fear. The boys' sentences are currently under review.

headline: Girl tells BBC she is 'scared to go out' after teenage rapists spared jail time
summary: Victim expresses fear after her teenage rapists avoided jail. Told BBC Newsnight she is scared to go out. The attackers' sentences are now under review.

headline: Burnham and Streeting accuse Blair of ignoring inequality as they hit back at ex-PM
summary: Labour mayor Burnham and former minister Streeting criticize Tony Blair. Accuse former PM of overlooking inequality. Response follows Blair's recent 5,600-word essay.
